profile.name: Rick Arko
profile.headline: Applied AI/ML Builder and Senior Data Scientist
profile.short_tagline: I build production ML systems, practical AI workflows, and decision tools that real teams can trust.
profile.availability: Open to senior applied AI/ML roles, staff-level data science opportunities, and selective consulting.

hero.eyebrow: Experienced builder, open to the right next opportunity
hero.headline: I build production ML systems and practical AI products that teams can actually use.
hero.subheadline: Over the last decade I have worked across forecasting, pricing, recommendation, and operational ML in production settings. I am now looking for the next chapter: strong teams, meaningful problems, and opportunities where hands-on technical judgment still matters.
highlights: 10+ years across forecasting, pricing, recommendation, and operational ML in production
Strong at bridging technical depth, product judgment, and stakeholder trust
Open to senior IC, lead, and selective consulting opportunities

stats.label: years building applied ML systems in production
experience across logistics, e-commerce, fintech, and operations
builder mindset from prototype architecture through deployment

about: I am an applied machine learning builder with a hands-on background in forecasting, pricing, recommendation systems, and production data products. Most of my work has lived in environments where reliability, clarity, and operational usefulness matter more than hype.

I enjoy turning ambiguous business problems into systems that actually ship. That can mean designing a grounded LLM workflow, improving an existing model stack, building better evaluation loops, or helping a team move from prototype thinking to dependable production behavior.
Right now I am especially interested in the next role or collaboration where I can contribute as a senior builder: close to the work, close to the stakeholders, and focused on useful outcomes.

services.title: Applied AI Product Design
services.description: Turn fuzzy AI ideas into scoped, useful products with clear user value, realistic architecture, and a path to delivery.

services.title: LLM Workflows and Evaluation
services.description: Design grounded assistants, retrieval workflows, internal knowledge tools, and evaluation loops with an eye on trust, cost, and maintainability.

services.title: Production ML Systems
services.description: Build or improve forecasting, pricing, recommendation, scoring, and optimization systems with an emphasis on measurable business impact.

services.title: Technical Leadership
services.description: Bring senior technical judgment, mentoring, prioritization, and cross-functional translation without drifting away from hands-on execution.

expertise.title: LLM Systems
expertise.description: Retrieval-augmented generation, prompt workflows, source-grounded answers, evaluation loops, and internal copilots.

expertise.title: Production Machine Learning
expertise.description: Forecasting, regression, classification, recommendation, anomaly detection, and experimentation in real operating environments.

expertise.title: Decision Infrastructure
expertise.description: Pricing services, operational planning tools, automation pipelines, and data products that have to support live business decisions.

expertise.title: Technical Translation
expertise.description: Bridging product, engineering, operators, analysts, and leadership so complex systems stay usable, trusted, and aligned with the business.

wins.title: Scaled network forecasting
wins.impact: Improved site-level error from 30%+ to under 15% by replacing hundreds of bespoke models with a more scalable ML approach.
wins.summary: Built forecasting systems that could survive constant network change, new locations, new product launches, and noisy operational data.

wins.title: Made pricing models more usable
wins.impact: Matched ensemble-level performance using only five common shipment features, making live pricing services far easier to operationalize.
wins.summary: Focused on practical model design, latency, interpretability, and business continuity in environments where downtime is expensive.

wins.title: Led through ambiguity
wins.impact: Helped grow teams, mentor junior talent, and translate technical work into decisions that stakeholders could actually act on.
wins.summary: Strong projects need more than model quality; they need communication, trust, and systems people can operate.

engagements.title: Senior IC or Staff-Level Role
engagements.description: A strong fit if you need someone who can own messy ML and AI problems end to end while collaborating well across product, engineering, and operations.

engagements.title: Technical Lead or Early AI Hire
engagements.description: Useful for teams that want a pragmatic builder who can shape direction, mentor others, and still stay close to the code and systems.

engagements.title: Selective Consulting
engagements.description: Available for focused advisory or build engagements when the problem is a strong fit and the work is meaningful.

insights.title: Topics I like writing and speaking about
insights.description: I am especially interested in the practical edge where ambitious AI ideas meet messy systems, real users, and actual business constraints.
topics: How to decide whether a use case needs an LLM, classic ML, or better product design
What makes RAG systems feel trustworthy instead of fragile
Evaluation patterns for AI features that touch real customer workflows
Why forecasting and operational ML still matter in the age of generative AI
How teams can avoid expensive AI platform detours early on
